overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a historic city at night during a thunderstorm. The character transitions from cobblestone streets lined with gas lamps to open railroad tracks and dirt paths on the outskirts of town, with lightning illuminating the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with fenced mansion and gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone sidewalk beside the large fenced historic building

entered.detail: large multi-story classical stone building with lit windows and columns
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars running along the building perimeter
tall palm trees lining the street in front of the building
vintage gas street lamps casting warm orange light onto the wet pavement
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the warm street lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic urban street at night, passing a large stone building with an iron fence and palm trees. Warm gas lamps illuminate the wet cobblestones, creating a moody atmosphere as the storm approaches.

events.description: exits the historic urban street and approaches the open railroad crossing
steps onto and crosses the railroad tracks heading away from the city center

agents.ego_description: walking across the railroad tracks while leaving the built-up urban area behind

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks crossing the dirt path ahead
weathered wooden plank fence lining the right side of the dirt path
silhouettes of buildings visible on the horizon against the dark stormy sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the city street, the character enters an open area and crosses railroad tracks. The wooden fence lines the right side of the dirt path as the urban street lamps fade into the distance and the storm sky becomes fully visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field approaching rural settlement in thunderstorm

events.description: bright lightning strike flashes across the dark storm clouds illuminating the landscape
second lightning strike illuminates the distant town and surrounding trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant town lights during the thunderstorm

notable_agents.action: horseback rider passes by on the left side of the path heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden telegraph poles with crossbars running alongside the railroad tracks
cluster of warm yellow lights from buildings in the distant town

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open field alongside railroad tracks as a thunderstorm rages overhead. Lightning periodically illuminates the sky while a horseback rider passes by on the left. The warm lights of a distant town glow ahead, guiding the way through the dark, stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a moody, lamp-lit urban street into a vast, storm-swept wilderness. It begins by following a character past a large stone building and iron fences, where warm gas lamps reflect off wet cobblestones. As the character leaves the city, the scene shifts toward an open area where the urban lights fade and the path turns to dirt, crossing over railroad tracks lined by a wooden fence. The environment then expands into an open field under a raging thunderstorm, with periodic flashes of lightning illuminating the dark sky as a horseback rider passes by. Finally, the camera continues along the tracks, guided by the distant, warm glow of a town shimmering through the rain.
